song_name: I Wish It Would Rain Down

I Wish It Would Rain Down

pro_brother.song_name: I Wish It Would Rain Down

content:
[Intro]
[ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch]
[ch]Em[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
[ch]D[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch]
[ch]Em[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab]                                   [ch]D[/ch]
You know I never meant to see you again[/tab]
[tab]                              [ch]Em7[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
But I only passed by as a friend, yeah[/tab]
[tab]                                 [ch]D[/ch]
All this time I stayed out of sight[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]
I started wonderin' why[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]                              [ch]Dsus4[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]
Now I... ooh, now I wish it would rain down... down on me[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]Dsus4[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]
Ooh, yes I wish it would rain... rain down on me now[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]Dsus4[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]
Ooh, now I wish it would rain down... down on me[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
Ooh, yes, I wish it would rain on me[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab]                                      [ch]D[/ch]
You said you didn't need me in your life[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]Em7[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
Oh, I guess you were right, yeah[/tab]
[tab]                                    [ch]D[/ch]
Ooh, I never meant to cause you no pain[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]B[/ch]       [ch]Em[/ch]
But it looks like I did it again, yeah[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]                             [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]
Now I... now I know I wish it would rain down... down on me[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]D[/ch]                      [ch]C[/ch]
Ooh, yes I wish it would rain... rain down on me now[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]Dsus4[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]
Ooh, but I wish it would rain down... down on me[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]Dm[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
Ooh, yes, I wish it would rain on me[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab]               [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
Though your hurt is gone, mine's hangin' on inside[/tab]
[tab]                                                                      [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]Am[/ch]
And I know... it's eating me through... it's eating me through every night and day[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]
I'm just waitin' on your sign[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]D[/ch]
'Cause I know, I know... I never meant to cause you no pain[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Em[/ch]                           [ch]D[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
And I realize I let you down, oh yeah[/tab]
[tab]                                   [ch]D[/ch]
But I know in my heart of hearts[/tab]
[tab]                                  [ch]Em[/ch]
I know I'm never gonna hold you again, no no[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]                                   [ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]
Now I... well now I know I wish it would rain down... down on me[/tab]
[tab]                               [ch]D[/ch]                      [ch]C[/ch]
Oh, you know I wish it would rain... rain down on me now[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]
Ooh, yes, I wish it would rain down... down on me[/tab]
[tab]                               [ch]D[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]
Yes, you know I wish it would rain down.. rain down over me[/tab]

[Interlude]
[ch]D[/ch]

[Outro]
[tab]                  [ch]Em7[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch]
Just rain down over me[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]
Just let it rain down, let it rain down[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Em[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]
Let it rain down, oh yeah[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]Em7[/ch]   [ch]Em[/ch]
Let it rain down, rain down over me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]D[/ch]
Just let it rain down, just let it rain down[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Em[/ch]
Let it rain down[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]G[/ch]
Just let it rain[/tab]
